news.title: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) Beats Q4 Sales Targets
news.summary: Semiconductor manufacturing equipment maker KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) reported revenue ahead of Wall Streets expectations in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 7.2% year on year to $3.30 billion. Guidance for next quarter’s revenue was better than expected at $3.35 billion at the midpoint, 1.9% above analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $8.85 per share was 0.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

news.title: KLA Corporation (KLAC) Gains Analyst Support as Revenue and EPS Forecasts Rise
news.summary: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) is among Goldman Sachs’ top semiconductor stock picks. On January 15, Wells Fargo upgraded its rating on KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC) from Equal Weight to Overweight, and lifted the price target from $1,250 to $1,600. The basis for the action was the investment bank’s confidence that KLA can continue to grow strongly in […]

news.title: KLA Corporation Reports Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Results
news.summary: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) today announced financial and operating results for its second quarter of fiscal year 2026, which ended on Dec. 31, 2025, and reported GAAP net income of $1.15 billion and GAAP net income per diluted share of $8.68 on revenues of $3.30 billion.

news.title: KLA Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
news.summary: KLA (NASDAQ:KLAC) reported December quarter 2025 results that management described as strong across revenue, profitability, cash generation, and capital returns, while also outlining an improving industry outlook for calendar 2026 and continued momentum tied to AI-driven semiconductor demand. news.summary: Will discuss today's results as well as our March and calendar 2026 outlook which we released after the market close and is available on our website along with supplemental materials. news.title: KLA: Fiscal Q2 Earnings Snapshot
news.summary: MILPITAS, Calif. AP) — KLA Corporation (KLAC) on Thursday reported fiscal second-quarter earnings of $1.15 billion. On a per-share basis, the Milpitas, California-based company said it had profit of $8.68.

news.title: KLA Q2 Adj. EPS $8.85 Beats $8.80 Estimate, Sales $3.297B Beat $3.249B Estimate
news.summary: KLA (NASDAQ:KLAC) reported quarterly earnings of $8.85 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $8.80 by 0.55 percent. This is a 7.93 percent increase over earnings of $8.20 per share from the same period

news.title: KLA (KLAC) Beats Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
news.summary: KLA (KLAC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +0.36% and +1.02%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
